channel.title: Lgbt on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Lgbt on Have an average day :|

item.title: I just learned I'm a closet homosexual...
item.description: Thanks Internet for telling me I’m a closet homosexual and I never knew I was! Gotta love free speech, even for dumb-asses. Otherwise how else would I get my comedy? In all seriousness though these people kind of deserve to step on a lego.
